title: Supply Chain Manager - Geodis India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Geodis India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Geodis India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Geodis India:
Geodis India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Geodis India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
